title: Detect contradictions on second staged-ingested source (mock spine step)
problem: ticket-155 proves build-relationships on OpenAlex rank #2. Operators cannot run detect-contradictions on the second staged source with deterministic mock fixtures to continue the Phase 3 multi-candidate spine toward cross-source qualification behavior.
acceptance_criteria: After ticket-155 spine through build-relationships, detect-contradictions on rank #2 source produces deterministic qualification/support edges from mock fixture (domain base seed as needed).
Unit test extends second-candidate build spine through detect-contradictions.
No live LLM in default pytest collection.
Golden tests remain mock-only and pass.
rollback_plan: Remove second-candidate detect fixture/test; retain ticket-155 build-relationships spine.
